## Summary
- What changed and why

## Security Guardrails (Required for Sensitive Routes)
- [ ] No new sensitive route in this PR
- [ ] Every new sensitive route has an RBAC permission guard
- [ ] Every new sensitive route emits audit events for success/failure
- [ ] Tests added for allow/deny authorization paths
- [ ] Tests added for audit event assertions

## Validation
- [ ] Focused tests passed locally
